patches.hypothesis: The method was not handling the case where the exception cause was null, which caused a NullPointerException.
The cause of the bug was a NullPointerException being thrown by the getCause() method when the Exception did not have a cause.
patches.changes:
- return details.getCause().getMessage();
+ return details.getCause() == null ? null : details.getCause().getMessage();
patches.diff:
- return details.getCause().getMessage();
+ return details.getCause() == null ? null : details.getCause().getMessage();

patches.hypothesis: The exception cause is null in the exceptionCauseMessageIfAvailable method
The exception cause message is null when the exception has no cause.
